_metadata.description: Manufacturer FDA violations and recall history
_metadata.scoring_rule: Deductions applied based on violation severity, recency, and resolution status. See manufacture_deduction_expl.json for full scoring framework.

severity_level_definitions.CRITICAL: Class I Recalls, toxic substances, undeclared drugs - base deduction -12 to -20
severity_level_definitions.HIGH: Class II Recalls, critical CGMP failures - base deduction -10 to -12
severity_level_definitions.MODERATE: Class III Recalls, minor CGMP issues, misbranding - base deduction -3 to -8

_metadata.pipeline_integration: Used by enrichment script to apply manufacturer trust score penalties during scoring

manufacturer_violations.product: Diamond Shruumz (Infused Cones, Chocolate Bars, Gummies)
manufacturer_violations.reason: Toxic levels of muscimol causing seizures, hospitalizations, and death
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: ⚠️ CRITICAL SAFETY ISSUE: Prophet Premium Blends products were recalled due to toxic muscimol contamination that caused 39 illnesses, 1 death, and seizures across 20 states. The recall is still unresolved. ALL products from this manufacturer should be avoided until quality control is demonstrated. Penalty: -23 pts (base -20 + unresolved -3). Trust Score: 77/100 (HIGH RISK).
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Highest severity - involved death and mass illnesses; unresolved recall indicates ongoing risk

manufacturer_violations.reason: Undeclared wheat allergen
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: ⚠️ ALLERGEN ALERT: Dorado Nutrition recalled products containing undeclared wheat allergen. This is a serious safety issue for those with wheat allergies (can cause anaphylaxis). The recall has been RESOLVED. Penalty: -12 pts (allergen severity). This manufacturer should have caught this during quality control. Monitor future products. Trust Score: 88/100 (ACCEPTABLE).
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Allergen issue resolved but indicates quality control gaps

manufacturer_violations.reason: Contains toxic yellow oleander instead of tejocote
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: 🚨 CRITICAL: Motivate Me Ashley products contained TOXIC YELLOW OLEANDER (cardiac glycoside) substituted for tejocote root. Yellow oleander causes serious cardiac and neurological damage. Violated in 4 product lines - indicating SYSTEMIC quality control failure, NOT isolated incident. Penalty: -23 pts (base -20 toxic + -3 multiple lines). ALL products from this manufacturer are flagged. Trust Score: 77/100 (HIGH RISK).
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Toxic substitution across multiple product lines indicates intentional or severe negligence

manufacturer_violations.product: Eva Nutrition, Science of Alpha, Niwali, NWL Nutra Tejocote Products
manufacturer_violations.reason: Contains toxic yellow oleander instead of tejocote root
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: 🚨 CRITICAL: Global Mix, Inc. (operating as Eva Nutrition, Science of Alpha, Niwali, NWL Nutra) distributed products containing TOXIC YELLOW OLEANDER instead of tejocote root. This hazardous plant caused cardiac and neurological issues. Affected 4 product lines under different brand names - classic rebranding with dangerous ingredients. Penalty: -23 pts (base -20 toxic + -3 multiple lines). AVOID all products from this manufacturer. Trust Score: 77/100 (HIGH RISK).
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Multiple brands/labels for same toxic product indicates intentional deception

manufacturer_violations.product: ELV ALIPOTEC Mexican Tejocote Root Supplement
manufacturer_violations.reason: Contains toxic yellow oleander
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: 🚨 CRITICAL: World Green Nutrition products contained TOXIC YELLOW OLEANDER. This plant contains cardiac glycosides that can cause severe heart problems and death. This is a historic toxicity issue with a pattern of recalls from this company. Penalty: -20 pts (toxic contamination). AVOID all products. Trust Score: 80/100 (ACCEPTABLE - due to age and resolved status, but high concern).
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Historic toxicity issue - suggests systemic sourcing problems

manufacturer_violations.reason: Contains toxic yellow oleander
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: 🚨 CRITICAL: Backstage Center's Alipotec products contained TOXIC YELLOW OLEANDER causing cardiac toxicity. Penalty: -20 pts. AVOID products. Trust Score: 80/100.
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Yellow oleander contamination

manufacturer_violations.reason: Undeclared diclofenac and dexamethasone
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: ⚠️ CRITICAL - UNDECLARED DRUGS: GNMART products contained hidden pharmaceutical drugs (Diclofenac - NSAID pain reliever, Dexamethasone - corticosteroid). These can cause serious interactions with other medications or health conditions. Recall UNRESOLVED. Users taking blood thinners, having kidney disease, or on other steroids face serious risk. Penalty: -18 pts (base -15 + unresolved -3). AVOID. Trust Score: 82/100 (CONCERNING).
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Multiple undeclared pharmaceutical drugs; unresolved recall is major red flag

manufacturer_violations.reason: Undeclared Metformin and Glyburide
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: ⚠️ CRITICAL - HIDDEN DIABETES DRUGS: Shoppers-Plaza products labeled as 'herbal formula' contained undeclared METFORMIN and GLYBURIDE (powerful diabetes medications). EXTREMELY DANGEROUS for non-diabetics or those taking other diabetes drugs (risk of hypoglycemia, kidney damage). Recall UNRESOLVED. Penalty: -18 pts. AVOID completely. Trust Score: 82/100 (CONCERNING).
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Diabetes drugs undeclared; unresolved; serious safety risk

manufacturer_violations.reason: Undeclared Sildenafil and Diclofenac
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: ⚠️ CRITICAL - UNDECLARED ERECTILE DYSFUNCTION DRUG: VitalityVita products across 2 product lines (VitalityXtra & PeakMax) contained undeclared SILDENAFIL (Viagra-like drug) and DICLOFENAC (NSAID). Hidden sildenafil causes sudden blood pressure drops, especially dangerous with heart medications or nitrates. AFFECTS MULTIPLE PRODUCT LINES indicating systemic quality failure. Penalty: -18 pts (base -15 undeclared drugs, but no additional multiple-line penalty applied as both under same recall). AVOID. Trust Score: 82/100.
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Two product lines with same violations

manufacturer_violations.reason: Undeclared Sildenafil and Diclofenac
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: ⚠️ CRITICAL - UNDECLARED ERECTILE DYSFUNCTION DRUG: Boulla LLC's ZoomMax and ZapMax products contained hidden SILDENAFIL and DICLOFENAC across 2 product lines. Same pattern as VitalityVita - indicates systemic supplier/quality control problem. Hidden sildenafil is life-threatening with certain heart medications. Recall UNRESOLVED. Penalty: -18 pts. AVOID all products from this manufacturer. Trust Score: 82/100 (CONCERNING).
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Multiple products with same drug contamination pattern

manufacturer_violations.reason: Undeclared Diclofenac, Dexamethasone, and Methocarbamol
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: ⚠️ CRITICAL - MULTIPLE UNDECLARED DRUGS: C&A Naturistics AK Forte contained 3 hidden pharmaceutical drugs: DICLOFENAC (NSAID), DEXAMETHASONE (steroid), and METHOCARBAMOL (muscle relaxant). This combination is dangerous with common medications (blood thinners, other pain relievers, statins). Recall UNRESOLVED. Penalty: -18 pts. AVOID. Trust Score: 82/100.
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Three different undeclared drugs in single product

manufacturer_violations.reason: Undeclared diclofenac and omeprazole
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: ⚠️ CRITICAL - UNDECLARED DRUGS IN BEAUTY SUPPLEMENT: MXBBB's UMARY (supposedly a hyaluronic acid beauty supplement) contained hidden DICLOFENAC (NSAID pain reliever) and OMEPRAZOLE (acid reflux medication). The presence of omeprazole suggests this was mislabeled pharmaceutical product sold as supplement. Dangerous if user already takes these drugs. Recall UNRESOLVED. Penalty: -18 pts. AVOID. Trust Score: 82/100.
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Anti-inflammatory and GI drug combination suggesting pharmaceutical misrepresentation

manufacturer_violations.product: Nhan Sam Tuyet Lien Truy Phong Hoan
manufacturer_violations.reason: Undeclared furosemide, Dexamethasone and Chlorpheniramine
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: ⚠️ CRITICAL - MULTIPLE UNDECLARED DRUGS IN HERBAL PRODUCT: buy-herbal.com's product contained 3 hidden drugs: FUROSEMIDE (diuretic for heart/hypertension), DEXAMETHASONE (steroid), and CHLORPHENIRAMINE (antihistamine). Furosemide can cause serious electrolyte imbalance and kidney problems if taken unknowingly. This product appears to be rebranded pharmaceutical. Recall UNRESOLVED. Penalty: -18 pts. AVOID. Trust Score: 82/100.
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Multiple drug classes undeclared; appears to be pharmaceutical rebranded as herbal

manufacturer_violations.reason: Undeclared dexamethasone and chlorpheniramine
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: 🚨 REPEAT OFFENDER - CRITICAL: 123Herbals has TWO separate recalls: (1) Vail-Bon Jie Yang Wan with hidden dexamethasone/chlorpheniramine, AND (2) Silintan capsules with hidden meloxicam (Jan 2026). This is a REPEAT VIOLATION pattern indicating systemic pharmaceutical adulteration. Long-term hidden steroid use causes bone loss, immune suppression. Penalty: -11.5 pts (raw -23 × 0.5 recency: base -15 + repeat -5 + unresolved -3). AVOID ALL 123Herbals products. Trust Score: 88/100 (HIGH RISK — recency-adjusted, but pattern is alarming).
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: REPEAT OFFENDER: Two separate recalls for different undeclared drugs in different products indicates intentional pharmaceutical adulteration

manufacturer_violations.reason: Undeclared acetaminophen, diclofenac and phenylbutazone
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: ⚠️ CRITICAL - MULTIPLE HIDDEN PAIN RELIEVERS: Guru Inc.'s Infla-650 contained 3 undeclared pain medications: ACETAMINOPHEN, DICLOFENAC (NSAID), and PHENYLBUTAZONE (powerful NSAID banned in many countries for human use). Taking multiple pain relievers unknowingly causes liver damage, GI bleeding, and kidney failure. If user is already taking Tylenol or ibuprofen, this combination is dangerous. Recall UNRESOLVED. Penalty: -18 pts. AVOID. Trust Score: 82/100.
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Multiple analgesics undeclared; phenylbutazone is restricted medication

manufacturer_violations.product: Hard Steel Capsules & Gold Hard Steel Plus Liquid
manufacturer_violations.reason: Undeclared sildenafil and acetaminophen
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: ⚠️ CRITICAL - HIDDEN ERECTILE DYSFUNCTION DRUG IN SEXUAL PERFORMANCE SUPPLEMENT: Supercore's Hard Steel products (Capsules & Liquid across 2 product lines) contained undeclared SILDENAFIL (Viagra) and ACETAMINOPHEN. While sildenafil effect is 'desired', NOT DISCLOSING it is dangerous because users don't know about interactions with heart medications, nitrates, or blood pressure drugs. Can cause sudden death with certain medications. AFFECTS 2 PRODUCT LINES - systemic quality failure. Recall UNRESOLVED. Penalty: -18 pts. AVOID. Trust Score: 82/100.
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Sexual performance product with dangerous undeclared drugs; multiple product lines affected

manufacturer_violations.reason: Contamination with E. coli O7:K1 and 1303
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: 🚨 FRESH ALERT - BACTERIAL CONTAMINATION: Purity Products' MyBladder supplement was JUST RECALLED (Oct 2025) for E. coli contamination. This is VERY RECENT - the product may still be on shelves. E. coli contamination causes severe diarrhea, kidney failure in severe cases. For urinary supplements, this is particularly dangerous. Recall is UNRESOLVED. Penalty: -18 pts. DO NOT USE - check your medicine cabinet immediately. Trust Score: 82/100 (CONCERNING).
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Recent E. coli contamination; very fresh recall

manufacturer_violations.reason: Potential Salmonella contamination
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: ⚠️ Class II Recall (RESOLVED): Penn Herb Company's thyroid formula was recalled for potential Salmonella contamination. Salmonella causes severe diarrhea, fever, and abdominal cramps lasting 7+ days. For immunocompromised users or elderly, it's serious. Status: RESOLVED (recall completed). Penalty: -10 pts. While resolved, indicates quality control gaps in manufacturing. Monitor other products from Penn Herb. Trust Score: 90/100 (EXCELLENT).
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Class II recall with resolved status; lower risk tier

manufacturer_violations.product: My GUT Shrooms Gummy and My IMMUNE Shrooms Capsule
manufacturer_violations.reason: Failed to establish component specifications for mushroom components - missing toxic element testing
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: ⚠️ FDA WARNING LETTER - QUALITY CONTROL FAILURE: Restorative Botanicals received an FDA warning letter for FAILING TO TEST mushroom products for toxic elements (heavy metals like lead, cadmium). Mushrooms are heavy metal accumulators - contaminated mushrooms can cause neurological damage over time. Affects 2 product lines (GUT & IMMUNE shrooms) - systemic facility problem. Company has NOT ADEQUATELY RESPONDED to FDA. Penalty: -15 pts (base -12 + multiple lines -3). HIGH CONCERN. Trust Score: 85/100 (ACCEPTABLE - monitor closely).
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: High-risk botanical ingredient without proper testing; unresolved; multiple lines affected

manufacturer_violations.reason: Failed to establish component specifications for purity and strength, inadequate manufacturing records
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: ⚠️ FDA WARNING LETTER - CRITICAL CGMP FAILURES: Top Health Manufacturing has FAILED to establish proper specifications for purity and ingredient strength in Grandma's Herbs Kidney supplement. Additionally, manufacturing records are inadequate - meaning there's no traceability if problems occur. This is especially concerning for kidney supplements where active ingredient consistency is critical for safety. FDA warning UNRESOLVED for 5+ months. Penalty: -15 pts. CAUTION ADVISED. Trust Score: 85/100.
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Critical CGMP failures in manufacturing controls; unresolved

manufacturer_violations.reason: Failed to establish component specifications, lacking heavy metal specifications for botanical components, misbranding
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: 🚨 FDA WARNING LETTER - SYSTEMIC FACILITY FAILURES: Formulation Technology has multiple CRITICAL CGMP violations affecting 5 different product lines: (1) Failed to test for heavy metals in botanicals, (2) Missing ingredient specifications, (3) Misbranding on labels. Five product lines indicates this is NOT isolated - it's a facility-wide quality control breakdown. Company has NOT adequately responded to FDA. Penalty: -15 pts (base -12 + multiple lines -3). AVOID all products from this manufacturer. Trust Score: 85/100.
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Multiple CGMP violations affecting multiple product lines; unresolved; systemic issue

manufacturer_violations.reason: Serious violations of CGMP regulations
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: ⚠️ FDA WARNING LETTER - SERIOUS CGMP VIOLATIONS: Txsyn International has SERIOUS, company-wide CGMP (Good Manufacturing Practice) violations affecting 3 product lines. When FDA uses the term 'serious violations,' it means the manufacturing facility cannot consistently produce safe, pure products. Company has NOT adequately addressed FDA concerns. Penalty: -15 pts (base -12 + multiple lines -3). Facility-wide problem. CAUTION with all products. Trust Score: 85/100.
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Systemic CGMP compliance issues; multiple product lines affected

manufacturer_violations.product: Gripe Water Original, Kids Cough Syrup products
manufacturer_violations.reason: Serious violations of CGMP, products also classified as unapproved new drugs
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: ⚠️ FDA WARNING LETTER - UNAPPROVED DRUG CLAIMS & CGMP FAILURES: M.O.M. Enterprises' Gripe Water and Kids Cough Syrup products have SERIOUS CGMP violations AND are being marketed as drugs without FDA approval. Products labeled 'not FDA-evaluated' but marketed with drug claims for cough/digestive relief. This is especially serious because these are infant/children products. Affects 2 product lines. Unresolved for 6+ months. Penalty: -15 pts. DO NOT USE ON CHILDREN. Trust Score: 85/100.
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Products marketed as drugs without approval; CGMP violations; multiple lines; children's products

manufacturer_violations.product: ESR Amino, Transfer Factor C, Heart Amino
manufacturer_violations.reason: Failed to establish product specifications, misbranding - lacking adverse event reporting contact
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: ⚠️ FDA WARNING LETTER - LABELING & SPECIFICATION FAILURES: Anti L'Age's amino acid and immune support products (3 product lines: ESR Amino, Transfer Factor C, Heart Amino) have misbranding issues and lack proper adverse event reporting contact information. While these are MODERATE severity (not critical contamination), it indicates quality control gaps. Users cannot report problems if they experience adverse effects. Penalty: -11 pts (base -8 + multiple lines -3). Monitor closely. Trust Score: 89/100.
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Multiple product lines with labeling violations; unresolved

manufacturer_violations.reason: Adulterated dietary supplement violations, CGMP violations
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: ⚠️ FDA WARNING LETTER - ADULTERATION & CGMP VIOLATIONS: Western Innovations has FDA warning for ADULTERATION (products contain harmful or illegal substances) PLUS CGMP violations, affecting 2 product lines. Adulteration is the most serious quality issue possible (products contain unapproved substances). Company has not adequately responded. Penalty: -15 pts. AVOID all products. Trust Score: 85/100.
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Adulteration with CGMP compliance failures; multiple product lines

manufacturer_violations.reason: Failed to establish component contamination specifications, product specifications, misbranding
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: ⚠️ FDA WARNING LETTER - UNRESOLVED FOR 2+ YEARS: Herbal Vitality received an FDA warning (March 2023) for failing to establish contamination specs for botanicals and misbranding - but has NOT adequately responded for 2+ years. This is a red flag: company is either ignoring FDA or unable to fix problems. 4 product lines affected. Penalty: -12 pts (base -12; recency multiplier 0.5 reduces newer penalties but this is 2+ years old AND unresolved so penalty remains). SERIOUS CONCERN. Trust Score: 85/100.
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Older violation (2+ years old) but still unresolved - indicates systemic inability to comply

manufacturer_violations.reason: CGMP violations
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: ✅ FDA WARNING LETTER - RESOLVED (2022): Quality Supplement Manufacturing had an FDA warning letter for CGMP violations, now 3+ years ago (Dec 2022) and has been RESOLVED. The company apparently corrected the issues. Penalty: -3 pts (base -12 × 0.25 recency). This is a good example of a manufacturer that had issues but fixed them. Trust Score: 97/100 (TRUSTED — resolved, low residual penalty).
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Older violation beyond 3 years - resolved; good compliance history after correction

manufacturer_violations.reason: Potential microbial contamination
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: ⚠️ Class II Recall (RESOLVED): Nature's Way had a Class II recall for potential microbial contamination affecting 3 product lines across 5 states. Recall is RESOLVED (2+ years ago). Recency has reduced penalty since issue was addressed. Nature's Way is a large, established company that appears to have corrected quality issues. Penalty: -8 pts (recency-adjusted). For context, this was 2+ years ago and appears isolated. Monitor ongoing. Trust Score: 90/100 (EXCELLENT).
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Multiple product lines affected, resolved; demonstrates ability to correct issues

manufacturer_violations.reason: Labeling error - incorrect expiration date
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: ℹ️ Class III Recall (RESOLVED): Goli Nutrition had a minor labeling recall - incorrect expiration date printed. Class III recalls are low-risk and this was purely a labeling issue, now resolved. Goli is a popular, well-known brand. This is an example of a minor, quickly-corrected issue. Penalty: -3 pts. Low concern. Trust Score: 97/100 (TRUSTED).
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Minor labeling issue, quickly resolved; good company track record

manufacturer_violations.reason: Potential foreign matter contamination
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: ⚠️ Class II Recall (RESOLVED): Vitacost.com (online supplement retailer) had a Class II recall for foreign matter contamination in multiple private label products (4 product lines across 15 states). Recall is RESOLVED (1.5+ years ago). As a large online retailer selling many private label products, this indicates some quality control issues but appears to have been corrected. Penalty: -8 pts (recency-adjusted). Vitacost carries thousands of products from many manufacturers. Monitor which manufacturers their products come from. Trust Score: 90/100.
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Multiple private label products affected; resolved; retailer/distributor quality issue

manufacturer_violations.reason: Potential Salmonella contamination
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: ℹ️ Class II Recall (RESOLVED 3+ YEARS AGO): Jarrow Formulas had a Salmonella contamination recall on B-Right Complex, resolved in June 2022 (3+ years ago). Jarrow is an established, reputable manufacturer. This was an isolated incident now well in the past. Penalty: -2.5 pts (heavily discounted due to age). Jarrow has demonstrated good compliance since. Trust Score: 98/100 (TRUSTED).
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Old violation (3+ years); resolved; established good company; isolated incident

manufacturer_violations.reason: Potential microcystin contamination above acceptable levels
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: ✅ Class II Recall (RESOLVED 5+ YEARS AGO): NOW Health Group had a Salmonella/microcystin contamination recall on spirulina in Nov 2019 - over 5 YEARS AGO. This is well beyond typical concern window and was resolved. NOW is an established, large manufacturer. No recent violations. Penalty: 0 pts (recency multiplier 0.0 due to extreme age + resolved). This shows NOW addressed issues and has maintained compliance. Trust Score: 100/100 (TRUSTED).
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Very old violation (5+ years); resolved; no recent issues; good ongoing compliance

manufacturer_violations.reason: Contains toxic yellow oleander
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: 🚨 CRITICAL - FRESH ALERT: SiluetaYa's tejocote root supplement contains TOXIC YELLOW OLEANDER (cardiac glycoside). This is a VERY RECENT recall (Nov 2025) - check your medicine cabinet immediately. Yellow oleander causes serious heart problems and neurological damage. Recall is UNRESOLVED. Penalty: -20 pts. DO NOT USE. Trust Score: 80/100 (CONCERNING - very recent).
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Fresh yellow oleander recall - VERIFY FDA ID on FDA.gov. Likely still resolving.

manufacturer_violations.reason: Undeclared prescription drug Tadalafil
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: ⚠️ CRITICAL - UNDECLARED TADALAFIL: Green Lumber Holding's dietary supplement contained hidden TADALAFIL (Cialis - erectile dysfunction drug). Tadalafil lowers blood pressure dangerously with certain heart medications or nitrates. Users taking blood pressure medications are at serious risk. Recall is UNRESOLVED. Penalty: -18 pts (base -15 + unresolved -3). AVOID. Trust Score: 82/100 (CONCERNING).
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Undeclared erectile dysfunction drug; unresolved; VERIFY FDA ID

manufacturer_violations.reason: Undeclared Chloropretadalafil, Propoxyphenylsildenafil, Sildenafil
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: ⚠️ CRITICAL - MULTIPLE UNDECLARED DRUGS: Health Fixer's male enhancement products contained THREE hidden pharmaceutical drugs: SILDENAFIL, CHLOROPRETADALAFIL, and PROPOXYPHENYLSILDENAFIL (designer versions of Viagra/Cialis). Extremely dangerous with heart medications or blood pressure drugs. Users on nitrates face risk of sudden death. Recall UNRESOLVED for 6+ months. Penalty: -18 pts. AVOID COMPLETELY. Trust Score: 82/100.
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Multiple undeclared erectile dysfunction drugs including designer versions; unresolved

manufacturer_violations.reason: Contaminated with elevated levels of lead and arsenic
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: 🚨 CRITICAL - HEAVY METAL POISONING RISK: Zaarah Herbals' herbal supplements were contaminated with ELEVATED LEVELS OF LEAD AND ARSENIC. Both are cumulative toxins causing neurological damage, cancer risk, and kidney damage over time. Even low doses accumulate in the body. Particularly dangerous for children and pregnant women. Recall UNRESOLVED for 8+ months. Penalty: -18 pts. DO NOT USE. Trust Score: 82/100 (HIGH RISK).
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Heavy metal contamination (lead + arsenic); unresolved; serious long-term health risk

manufacturer_violations.reason: Undeclared Tadalafil
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: ⚠️ CRITICAL - UNDECLARED TADALAFIL IN IRON SUPPLEMENT: Natural Dior's Vitafer L Gold (supposedly an iron supplement) contained hidden TADALAFIL (Cialis). This is especially dangerous because iron supplements are often taken by people with anemia/heart conditions, and tadalafil causes dangerous blood pressure drops. Recall UNRESOLVED for 9+ months. Penalty: -18 pts. AVOID. Trust Score: 82/100.
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Undeclared tadalafil in mislabeled product; unresolved; dangerous for cardiac patients

manufacturer_violations.reason: Undeclared Sildenafil and Tadalafil
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: ⚠️ CRITICAL - UNDECLARED ERECTILE DYSFUNCTION DRUGS: One Source Nutrition's Vitality male enhancement capsules contained TWO hidden drugs: SILDENAFIL (Viagra) and TADALAFIL (Cialis). Undeclared because user doesn't know about interactions with heart medications or nitrates - risk of sudden death. Recall UNRESOLVED for 9+ months. Penalty: -18 pts. AVOID COMPLETELY. Trust Score: 82/100.
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Two undeclared ED drugs; unresolved for 9+ months; life-threatening interaction risk

manufacturer_violations.reason: Undeclared Sildenafil and Tadalafil
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: ⚠️ CRITICAL - UNDECLARED ERECTILE DYSFUNCTION DRUGS: StuffbyNainax LLC's MR.7 SUPER 700000 capsules contain hidden SILDENAFIL (Viagra) and TADALAFIL (Cialis). Distributed NATIONWIDE between Aug-Nov 2025. These drugs cause dangerous blood pressure drops with heart medications or nitrates - potentially fatal. Recall is UNRESOLVED. Penalty: -18 pts (base -15 + unresolved -3). AVOID. Trust Score: 82/100.
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Recent nationwide distribution; multiple undeclared ED drugs

manufacturer_violations.product: Multiple FDA-regulated products including dietary supplements
manufacturer_violations.reason: Rodent and avian contamination at facility
